prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, generate variants of MMP2 (Metallo protease) from Homo sapiens with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. specify a computational protocol covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using AlphaFold2, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: MMP2; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
